news.headline: Stock market indexes fell today after inflation report met expectations; Financial stock surged. Dow and Nasdaq declined.
news.summary: Today, there was a decline in major stock indexes following the release of the latest inflation report, which was largely in line with forecasts. The Dow and Nasdaq experienced decreases, while financial stocks saw a surge due to a positive analyst report. This live coverage provides insights into the market fluctuations.

news.headline: Experts forecast that Artificial General Intelligence (AGI) may emerge in 3-8 years due to tech progress and collaboration.
news.summary: Leading experts in the field predict that achieving Artificial General Intelligence (AGI) could be possible within the next 3 to 8 years. This ambitious timeline is primarily attributed to the rapid evolution of technology and increased international cooperation among researchers and developers. AGI, which aims to create machines capable of performing any intellectual task that a human can, could potentially revolutionize various industries and sectors. The close collaboration within the global scientific community is seen as a significant driving force behind the accelerated development of AGI.

news.headline: Global waste to hydrogen market analysis and forecast from 2024-2034 includes companies like BEEAH, Boson Energy, and Chevron leading innovations.
news.summary: A recent report titled "Waste to Hydrogen Market - A Global and Regional Analysis" has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. This report focuses on analyzing the market from 2024 to 2034, emphasizing technology, waste type, application, and region. The waste to hydrogen market is seen as a promising sector for tackling environmental issues and meeting energy needs. Stakeholders are advised to grasp market dynamics and regional patterns to make the most of upcoming prospects. This analysis provides crucial insights for those looking to capitalize on the significant opportunities in the waste to hydrogen market.

news.headline: Alicia Keys partners with Amazon Alexa for first-of-its-kind collab in beauty industry. Keys Soulcare offers holistic beauty and wellness rituals.
news.summary: In a first-of-its-kind collaboration, Alicia Keys and Amazon Alexa discuss Keys Soulcare in an immersive experience. The brand, co-founded by Keys and e.l.f. Beauty, offers holistic beauty and wellness rituals for Alexa customers. The release, dated June 26, 2024, was revised due to multiple updates and new multimedia assets.

news.headline: Analyst predicts minimal market impact from Mt. Gox Bitcoin distribution, with only 64,000 BTC out of 142,000 likely to be distributed. Optimistic about Ethereum ETF inflows.
news.summary: Crypto analyst Alex Thorn from Galaxy Research provided insights on the upcoming distributions of Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) from Mt. Gox. Thorn anticipated that only 64,000 out of the total 142,000 BTC would be distributed to individual creditors. He suggested that the market impact might be limited as a significant portion of the distributed BTC would not be sold immediately. Thorn highlighted that many Mt. Gox creditors are likely long-term holders of Bitcoin who have refrained from selling their claims for an extended period. He estimated that if 10% of the 64,000 BTC were sold, it would amount to 6,500 BTC. Thorn also expressed optimism regarding Ethereum (CRYPTO: ETH) ETF inflows. This information was shared during a recent episode of the Unchained podcast. The full story can be found on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Mitel's VCCS wins "Virtual Workspace Platform of the Year" for 2024 by RemoteTech Breakthrough. Standout tech for remote work.
news.summary: Mitel, a leading business communications company based in Sunnyvale, California, recently revealed that its Virtual Care Collaboration Service (VCCS) was awarded the title of "Virtual Workspace Platform of the Year" in the 5th Annual RemoteTech Breakthrough Awards. This competition, organized by RemoteTech Breakthrough, a prominent market intelligence group, aims to acknowledge outstanding technology firms, products, and services that support remote work and geographically dispersed teams worldwide. The recognition further establishes Mitel's VCCS as a standout solution in facilitating collaboration and connectivity in remote work environments.

news.headline: Pokémon GO update (v315.2) likely blocks location spoofing, causing "failed to detect location 12 error" for many gamers.
news.summary: A recent update to Pokémon GO on June 7, 2024, introduced version 315.2, which is believed to have incorporated sophisticated location tracking features to counter prevalent location spoofing techniques. Consequently, a significant number of players are encountering an error message displaying "failed to detect location 12 Pokémon GO" when attempting to falsify their location within the game. This update has heightened security measures to discourage cheating practices and maintain fair gameplay among users.

news.headline: Global carpentry services market to grow by USD 94.9 billion by 2028, with a CAGR of 5.63% fueled by on-demand services.
news.summary: As of June 28, 2024, the worldwide carpentry services sector is projected to expand by approximately USD 94.9 billion between 2024 and 2028, with a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 5.63% predicted during this period, as per Technavio's analysis. The rise in the need for on-demand carpentry services is considered a significant driver for this growth.

news.headline: HII's Ingalls Shipbuilding hosts 23 Mississippi educators for a two-week externship from June 3-14, 2024.
news.summary: In Pascagoula, Mississippi, on June 28, 2024, HII's (NYSE: HII) Ingalls Shipbuilding division welcomed 23 educators from Mississippi for a two-week Educator Externship program at its shipyard. The initiative took place from June 3 to June 14 and was overseen by the Ingalls human resources and administration team. The program allowed educators to collaborate with shipbuilders across the yard, offering them hands-on experience in the shipbuilding industry.

news.headline: Walgreens Boots Alliance to close 25% of stores due to financial concerns, with shares tumbling 25%. EPS guidance lowered to $2.80-$2.95 for FY2024.
news.summary: On Thursday, Walgreens Boots Alliance Inc disclosed a 2.6% increase in third-quarter fiscal year 2024 sales, totaling $36.35 billion (+2.5% on constant currency), surpassing the projected $36 billion. The company revised its fiscal year 2024 adjusted EPS guidance to $2.80-$2.95 from the prior $3.20-$3.35, contrary to the projected $3.22. In response to the earnings miss, the pharmacy chain plans to shut down a considerable number of stores amidst financial challenges. The disappointing report led to a share drop of up to 25%. Analysts at Barclays adjusted the price target from $15 to $11 while maintaining an Underweight rating due to the EPS revision for fiscal year 2024 by Walgreens Boots Alliance.

news.headline: Dogecoin and Shiba Inu slip in rankings, Dogecoin's market cap is $28 billion, Shiba Inu's market cap is $22.8 billion.
news.summary: Dogecoin (CRYPTO: DOGE) and Shiba Inu (CRYPTO: SHIB) have experienced a decline in their rankings within the crypto market recently. The combined market capitalization of these meme coins increased by 1.6% over the past 24 hours, reaching $50.8 billion. However, $28 billion of this total can be attributed to Dogecoin and Shiba Inu. Dogecoin has slipped to the ninth position, while Shiba Inu dropped from 11th to 13th place in the rankings. Dogecoin, previously supported by Elon Musk, has yet to show any progress towards being accepted as a payment method on X (formerly Twitter). Shiba Inu, which was among the top 10 cryptocurrencies earlier in 2024, is currently working on... (for full story, refer to Benzinga.com).

news.headline: TKO Miller wins 2 USA M&A Atlas Awards at 2024 Global M&A Network Gala; recognized for USA Buyout Deal of the Year.
news.summary: Milwaukee, June 28, 2024 - TKO Miller, a prominent middle-market investment bank, has been honored by the Global M&A Network with the prestigious 2024 USA Buyout Deal of the Year award for their advisory involvement in Fort Point Capital's acquisition of Visu-Sewer.

news.headline: MicroStrategy could soon see price swings amplified by 2x exposure through leveraged ETFs, likened to spicy peppers by an analyst.
news.summary: One analyst likened the leveraged ETFs offering 2x exposure to MicroStrategy's stock price to scorching hot peppers due to their intensity.

news.headline: Eleanor Aldous and Caleb Miller of Aldous\Walker LLP named to Lawdragon 500 X – The Next Generation 2024.
news.summary: Two attorneys from the boutique trial law firm Aldous\Walker LLP, Eleanor Aldous and Caleb Miller, have been recognized in the 2024 edition of Lawdragon 500 X – The Next Generation. This prestigious list highlights top young lawyers making an impact in their field. The inclusion of Aldous and Miller showcases their exceptional talent and dedication to the legal profession. Such recognition solidifies their position among the next generation of legal leaders. This achievement is a testament to their hard work and expertise, further establishing Aldous\Walker LLP as a prominent player in the industry.

news.headline: 21Shares applies for a Solana spot ETF to track SOL's performance in the market, following VanEck's similar filing.
news.summary: 21Shares has submitted an application for a Solana spot ETF, in line with VanEck's recent filing. This move signifies progress in integrating cryptocurrency investments into traditional financial markets. The 21Shares Core Solana ETF, if approved, will monitor the performance of SOL, Solana's native digital asset. The Trust intends to possess SOL and value its shares daily using a specified index. The application also details a contingency plan for potential... (Remaining details can be found on Benzinga.com)

news.headline: Solidigm SSDs assisted in setting a pi calculation record of 202 trillion digits with Intel Xeon CPUs.
news.summary: In Rancho Cordova, California, Solidigm and StorageReview achieved a groundbreaking milestone by setting a new pi calculation record. This feat involved computing an impressive 202 trillion digits of pi. The record was made possible through the utilization of Solidigm SSDs and Intel Xeon CPUs.

news.headline: IDEX Biometrics registered share capital increase on 28 June 2024 after private placement of 33.3 million shares at NOK 1.65 each.
news.summary: On May 15, 2024 (later corrected on May 20, 2024), an announcement was made concerning a private placement of 33.3 million shares at a price of NOK 1.65 per share. This placement was divided into two separate tranches.

news.headline: Get in on Binance's new promo to win 20,000 USDC in token vouchers by depositing and trading AI tokens. (Read More)
news.summary: A promotional campaign has been launched by Binance offering users the chance to receive token vouchers totaling 20,000 USDC. To be eligible, users must deposit and trade specific AI tokens. For more details on this promotion, visit the official website.

news.headline: Wall Street hesitates despite Fed's inflation drop to 2.6% in May 2024; markets cautious post-debate as energy stocks rise.
news.summary: Midday trading on Wall Street was uneventful as major indices saw slight declines despite positive May 2024 inflation data. The Personal Consumption Expenditure (PCE) price index, a key inflation indicator for the Federal Reserve, hit a low not seen since March 2021, with an annual rate of 2.6% meeting economist forecasts. This signals inflation is nearing the Fed's 2% target, heightening expectations of potential interest rate cuts. Market reactions appeared cautious, likely due to investors assessing the fallout from the recent presidential debate between President Joe Biden and former President Donald Trump. Trump's perceived victory in the debate influenced market sentiment. Energy stocks outperformed other sectors in the S&P 500.

news.headline: meviy platform by MISUMI Group Inc. enhances CNC milling capabilities in metal materials. Widened machining coverage for Steel, Pre-Hardened, and more.
news.summary: In Schaumburg, Illinois, on June 28, 2024, the innovative parts procurement platform meviy, created by MISUMI Group Inc., has made noteworthy progress in CNC milling capabilities for various metal materials, such as Steel and Pre-Hardened.

news.headline: KD introduces new kitchenware collection inspired by iconic cheesy hue of Mac 'N Cheese. Comforting ritual for fans continues with paprika and turmeric ingredients. Proud statement from KD.
news.summary: In Toronto, a popular meal for many is KD Mac 'N Cheese, which goes beyond just nourishment to become a comforting ritual for fans. The ingredients paprika and turmeric in each box give a lasting golden hue to kitchenware, making it a familiar sight for consumers throughout their lives. Today, Kraft Dinner celebrates this tradition by introducing a new product.

news.headline: Subsea 7 S.A. notified by Barclays Capital Securities Limited of crossing thresholds under Luxembourg's Transparency Law.
news.summary: On June 28, 2024, Subsea 7 S.A. was notified by Barclays Capital Securities Limited that they had exceeded the thresholds outlined in Luxembourg's Transparency Law of 11 January 2008 for securities issuers. Subsea 7 S.A. trades on the Oslo Børs as SUBC and via ADR as SUBCY.

news.headline: Millennials are investing in stocks, ETFs, personal finance, and managing student loans for retirement. Trends analyzed by Investor's Business Daily.
news.summary: Discover the investment and retirement planning strategies favored by millennials in today's market. Learn about the surprising trends shaping their financial decisions, including their preferences for stocks, ETFs, personal finance management, and addressing student loan obligations. Explore how this generation is navigating the investment landscape to secure their financial futures.

news.headline: Legal action filed by SEC against Consensys for MetaMask’s brokerage and staking services.
news.summary: In recent developments, the global COVID-19 death toll has surpassed 4.5 million, with over 200 million confirmed cases worldwide. The United States has recorded the highest number of cases, exceeding 35 million, and continues to grapple with rising infections. Vaccination efforts have been ongoing, with over 4 billion doses administered globally. However, disparities in vaccine distribution persist, leading to concerns about achieving herd immunity. Governments are urging citizens to remain vigilant and adhere to safety measures to curb the spread of the virus. In economic news, the latest data indicates a fluctuating stock market, with the Dow Jones Industrial Average reaching a new record high of 35,000 points. Experts are closely monitoring inflation rates and geopolitical tensions for their impact on market stability. Furthermore, unemployment rates have shown a slight decrease, but challenges remain as businesses navigate the post-pandemic recovery phase. Overall, the global community faces a complex landscape as it continues to address the multifaceted effects of the ongoing pandemic.

news.headline: Amazon's stock hits record high under CEO Andy Jassy after cost-cutting strategy, services focus; future plans uncertain.
news.summary: Following three turbulent years as Amazon's CEO, Andy Jassy's emphasis on reducing costs and expanding services has propelled the stock to all-time highs. The company continues to achieve milestones under his leadership.

news.headline: Trump-backed DJT drops after Biden's debated. Trump and Biden appeared on CNN. - Investor's Business Daily.
news.summary: Former President Donald Trump and current President Joe Biden engaged in a debate hosted by CNN on Thursday. Following Biden's debate performance, the stock of DJT, a company backed by Trump, initially saw a decrease but later rebounded. The debate has received criticism for Biden's performance.

news.headline: Valour in Toronto issues fund for Bitcoin Staking Layer-1 Core token tracking. Wholly owned by DeFi Technologies.
news.summary: Valour, a subsidiary of DeFi Technologies based in Toronto, will be launching the fund.

news.headline: 93 entities borrow $664.570 billion through Fed Reverse Repo Operation.
Thousands attend SelectUSA Investment Summit to discuss deals like Nippon's, impacting state economies.
news.summary: This week, a significant number of foreign investors and state economic officials are gathered in town for the Commerce Department’s SelectUSA Investment Summit. The event has attracted thousands of attendees from various countries, highlighting the importance of international investment in the US economy.

news.headline: Sonoco acquires Eviosys for $3.9B, expanding metal packaging operations with focus on organic growth and strategic acquisitions.
news.summary: Sonoco Products Company (NYSE:SON) has agreed to acquire Eviosys for approximately EUR3.615 billion ($3.9 billion) in a debt-free, cash-free deal. Eviosys specializes in metal packaging production, including food cans, aerosol cans, metal closures, and promotional packaging, with a strong presence in metal food can manufacturing through 44 facilities spanning 17 countries and a workforce of about 6,300 employees. This acquisition aligns with Sonoco’s strategy to enhance its core operations and capitalize on growth opportunities through both organic expansion and strategic purchases. To fund the acquisition, Sonoco plans to take on new debt and up to $500 million from equity issuance, with $200 million of that sum coming from KPS. Sonoco aims to maintain its investment-grade credit rating and intends to decrease net leverage to below 3.0x in less than two years with the help of divestiture proceeds and operational cash flow.

news.headline: World Bank forecasts brighter economic growth outlook, but warns that increasing trade barriers could harm global output.
news.summary: The increasing implementation of trade barriers presents a significant challenge to global economic output in the long run, as protectionist measures become more widespread. This poses a threat to the global economy as countries face potential impediments to trade and growth.

news.headline: CFPB Director Chopra to face Congress over funding for emboldened bureau.
news.summary: This week, Rohit Chopra, the Director of the Consumer Financial Protection Bureau, will appear before Congress. He leads the bureau during a time of increased empowerment and scrutiny.

news.headline: Article highlights 3 mutual funds for retirement, emphasizing Zacks Mutual Fund Rank as tool. Recommends funds with solid performance, diversification, and low fees. Mentions Fidelity Advisor Balanced Fund A.
news.summary: It's never too late to start investing in mutual funds for retirement. The Zacks Mutual Fund Rank is a valuable tool for investors seeking the best funds. Ensuring strong performance, diversification, and low fees is crucial in shortlisting great mutual funds. By utilizing the Zacks Mutual Fund Rank, we have pinpointed three top-ranked mutual funds that could enhance one's retirement portfolio. The Fidelity Advisor Balanced Fund A is among the highest ranked funds with low fees to consider for potential investment. For more details, check out the complete article on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Rising jobless claims raise Fed rate-cut odds, S&P 500 climbs; May's CPI and PPI data discussed.
news.summary: The significant Federal Reserve inflation rate received positive updates from the Consumer Price Index in May. However, the recent data on the Producer Price Index provides a more comprehensive outlook. A rise in jobless claims and soft Producer Price Index numbers have increased the likelihood of a Federal Reserve rate cut. As a result, the S&P 500 has observed an increase.

news.headline: Montana's cow population surpasses its human residents as locals turn to Brazilian beef; Cole Mannix aims to disrupt the meatpacking industry dominance.
news.summary: Cole Mannix from Old Salt Co-op is working to shift local preferences and disrupt an industry dominated by meatpackers worth billions of dollars.

news.headline: Cryptocurrency debate in Washington escalates, with $3 trillion market at stake.
Mulvihill Capital Management Inc. revealed ratios for Class A Share consolidation and Preferred Share exchange.
news.summary: Mulvihill Capital Management Inc. has declared the ratios for the consolidation of Class A shares and the exchange of preferred shares. Shareholders holding Class A shares will be impacted by the consolidation ratio of [insert ratio], whereas holders of preferred shares will be affected by the exchange ratio of [insert ratio]. The company is implementing these changes as part of its strategic financial restructuring plan.

news.headline: Fed inflation rate slows, boosting rate-cut hopes; S&P 500 rises. Investors optimistic amid slowest pace since 2020.
news.summary: The Federal Reserve's primary inflation gauge increased at its lowest rate since the end of 2020. Investors reacted positively to this news, leading to a rise in the S&P 500 index as hopes for potential rate cuts grew.

news.headline: Trump's policies could impact investors by weakening the Fed's independence and the dollar, while increasing fiscal policy through money printing, Larry Summers states.
news.summary: Larry Summers has expressed concerns that certain policies proposed by Trump could potentially undermine the Federal Reserve's independence and weaken the US dollar. Summers warned that these policies may involve an expansion of fiscal policy by printing more money.

news.headline: Supreme Court supports Starbucks in 'Memphis 7' union case, making it tougher for NLRB to reinstate fired workers.
news.summary: In a setback for the National Labor Relations Board, the Supreme Court ruled in favor of making it harder for them to mandate employers to rehire terminated employees.

news.headline: Top US banks, including JPMorgan Chase, Bank of America, and Citigroup, buy back over $14 billion in shares, a 73% increase from last year despite stress tests.
news.summary: The six largest banks in the U.S. have shown resilience despite this week's stress tests on capital levels, continuing to prioritize returning value to shareholders. JPMorgan Chase & Co. (NYSE:JPM), Bank of America Corporation (NYSE:BAC), Wells Fargo & Company (NYSE:WFC), Citigroup Inc. (NYSE:C), U.S. Bancorp (NYSE:USB), and The PNC Financial Services Group, Inc. (NYSE:PNC) collectively repurchased over $14 billion in shares in Q1, marking a significant 73% increase compared to the previous six months of 2023. These actions highlight their confidence and financial strength in navigating challenges. The stress test, a measure implemented post-2008 financial crisis, plays a crucial role in evaluating the stability and resilience of financial institutions. For more details, the full story is accessible on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: US Bank Stress Test results to be released this week, expected to show improved capital buffers; banks have around 300 basis points excess CET1 capital, up from 185 last year. Improved resiliency in face of macroeconomic challenges anticipated. Fed's 2024 stress test scenarios include funding stress and large hedge fund failures.
news.summary: The U.S. banking sector awaits the 2024 stress test results, set to be disclosed after the market closes. Analyst Ebrahim H. Poonawala predicts improved capital buffers compared to 2023, with approximately 300 basis points of excess Common Equity Tier 1 capital for banks, up from 185 bp last year. The stress test scenarios include funding stress and the failure of five large hedge funds, aiming to evaluate the U.S. banking system's resilience. This year's stress test is anticipated to demonstrate better ability to tackle challenges amidst the current economic environment and regulatory changes.

news.headline: Japanese yen hits 160 per dollar, lowest since 1986. Bank of Japan intervention possible as yen depreciates by a third in three years.
news.summary: The Japanese yen has dropped below 160 per dollar, hitting its lowest level since December 1987. The Bank of Japan had intervened in late April 2024 to control the yen's volatility but failed to prevent its slide. The yen has depreciated by 1/3 of its value over the last three years due to a persistent interest rate gap between the Bank of Japan and other major central banks, especially the Fed. The Bank of Japan maintained its short-term interest rate at around 0% to 0.1% in June and hinted at decreasing its monthly bond purchases of JPY 6 trillion in July. Japan spent $61.3 billion on currency interventions in late April to late May. The U.S. Treasury Department added Japan to its foreign exchange "monitoring list" due to meeting two out of three mechanical criteria, not linked to the recent interventions to support the yen. The chart displays a higher dollar-yen exchange rate, indicating a stronger dollar against the yen.

news.headline: Nevada Copper Corp. (TSX: NCU) provided update on Chapter 11 bankruptcy process & management appointments, June 17, 2024.
news.summary: In Yerington, Nevada, on June 17, 2024, Nevada Copper Corp. (TSX: NCU) (OTC: NEVDF) (FSE: ZYTA) shared an update regarding its Chapter 11 bankruptcy proceedings and recent management appointments. The company and its subsidiaries provided this information, outlining key developments in its reorganization efforts.

news.headline: Dow Jones up, Nasdaq down due to Nvidia; Bitcoin retreats. Amazon, Meta in buy zones. via Investor's Business Daily.
news.summary: The Dow Jones Industrial Average experienced an increase, with a rise in value, as Nvidia's performance negatively impacted the Nasdaq index. In contrast, Bitcoin saw a decline in its value. The stock prices of Amazon and Meta were in favorable buy zones amidst these market movements.

news.headline: Company repurchased 50,000 of its own shares at $10 each, totaling $500,000 in transactions.
Investment professionals face a tough decision on Wall Street: prioritize short-term gains or climate benefits amid growing climate risks.
news.summary: As the risks of climate change become clearer, portfolio managers are facing conflicting motivations. The economic and financial risks associated with climate change are becoming more evident, though still uncertain. This uncertainty poses challenges for managers as they navigate how to factor these risks into their decision-making processes.

news.headline: PureSky Energy launches Gouverneur NY Solar II, 18th site in NY, advancing sustainable energy solutions.
news.summary: In Gouverneur, New York, on June 28, 2024, PureSky Energy, a prominent provider of sustainable energy solutions, revealed the commencement of operations for a fresh community solar farm venture. This project signifies PureSky's eighteenth site within the state of New York, solidifying their position as a significant player in the sustainable energy sector.

news.headline: U.S. banks are buying credit derivatives to shift loan book risk from hedge funds, PE firms, and asset managers in private debt market.
news.summary: An increasing amount of banks in the United States are reducing their loan book risk by acquiring credit derivatives from hedge funds, private equity firms, and asset managers who are prominent figures in the private debt sector.

news.headline: 80% of voters are calling for more focus on caregiving policies like paid leave and tax credits from politicians.
news.summary: 80% of voters are in favor of politicians focusing on increasing investment in caregiving policies such as paid leave and tax credits.
